'''fazuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyabakura|kyabakura]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyabakura|kyabakura]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fazuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæzizith|fæzizith]] || [[word:fæzizij|fæzizij]] || [[word:fæzizish|fæzizish]] || [[word:fæzizi|fæzizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazuzuzuth|fazuzuzuth]] || [[word:fazuzuzuj|fazuzuzuj]] || [[word:fazuzuzush|fazuzuzush]] || [[word:fazuzuzu|fazuzuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazuzuth|fazuzuth]] || [[word:fazuzuj|fazuzuj]] || [[word:fazuzush|fazuzush]] || [[word:fazuzu|fazuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazufzuth|fazufzuth]] || [[word:fazufzuj|fazufzuj]] || [[word:fazufzush|fazufzush]] || [[word:fazufzuf|fazufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fazuzuthu|fazuzuthu]] || [[word:fazuzuju|fazuzuju]] || [[word:fazuzushu|fazuzushu]] || [[word:fazuzuku|fazuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fazuzuth|fazuzuth]] || [[word:fazuzuj|fazuzuj]] || [[word:fazuzush|fazuzush]] || [[word:fazuzu|fazuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fazuzuthul|fazuzuthul]] || [[word:fazuzujul|fazuzujul]] || [[word:fazuzushul|fazuzushul]] || [[word:fazuzukul|fazuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fazuzuthuthu|fazuzuthuthu]] || [[word:fazuzujuju|fazuzujuju]] || [[word:fazuzushushu|fazuzushushu]] || [[word:fazuzuku|fazuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fazuzuthun|fazuzuthun]] || [[word:fazuzujun|fazuzujun]] || [[word:fazuzushun|fazuzushun]] || [[word:fazuzukun|fazuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fazuzuthuoro|fazuzuthuoro]] || [[word:fazuzujuoro|fazuzujuoro]] || [[word:fazuzushuoro|fazuzushuoro]] || [[word:fazuzukuoro|fazuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
